controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - financial statements: presentation and disclosures) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Payments Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period
controls.control_description:
In terms of the provisions of section 29 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, a
bank shall in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and
profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period, as
the case may be, in the Forms set out in the Third Schedule of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in respect of all business transacted by it prepare a balance sheet and profit and loss account as on the last working day of the year or the period

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the general instructions for the compilation of balance sheet and profit and loss account as specified in subparagraph (1) below
controls.control_description:
A bank shall follow the general instructions for the compilation of balance sheet
and profit and loss account as specified in subparagraph (1) below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the general instructions for the compilation of balance sheet and profit and loss account as specified in subparagraph (1) below

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure strict compliance with the accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
A bank shall
ensure strict compliance with the Accounting Standards notified under the
Companies (Accounting Standards) Rules, 2021, as amended from time to time,
subject to Directions / Guidelines issued by the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure strict compliance with the accounting standards notified under the companies (accounting standards) rules, 2021, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction
controls.control_description:
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction, or item in instructions for
compilation does not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the
extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility
or otherwise of an activity or transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

and expenses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be if the income is reckoned net of costs
controls.control_description:
Since materiality is not objectively defined, it has been
decided that all banks should ensure compliance with the provisions of the
Accounting Standard in respect of any item of prior period income or prior
period expenditure which exceeds one per cent of the total income / total
expenditure of the bank if the income / expenditure is reckoned on a gross basis
or one per cent of the net profit before taxes or net losses, as the case may be
if the income is reckoned net of costs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be if the income is reckoned net of costs

controls.control_description:

and non-performing investments, in compliance with the regulatory
prescriptions of the RBI, shall not attract a qualification by the statutory auditors
as this would be in conformity with provisions of the standard, as it recognises
postponement of recognition of revenue where collectability of the revenue is
significantly uncertain.

and the foreign currency at the date of the transaction.

of the transaction for recording the foreign currency transactions as required

which a bank may have in applying the exchange rates at the dates of the
transactions, and since the Standard allows the use of a rate that
approximates the actual rate at the date of the transaction, the bank may

controls.control_description:

being recorded in Indian Rupees at the date of the transaction, or are being
recorded using a notional exchange rate shall now be recorded at the date
of the transaction by using the weekly average closing rate of the preceding
week, published by FEDAI, if the same approximates the actual rate at the
date of the transaction.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used

(iv) If the weekly average closing rate of the preceding week does not
approximate the actual rate at the date of the transaction, the closing rate
at the date of the transaction shall be used.

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare and disclose cfs in its annual reports, in the formats prescribed in annex ii
controls.control_description:

prescribed under Section 29 of Banking Regulation Act, 1949, a bank, whether
listed or unlisted, shall prepare and disclose CFS in its Annual Reports, in the
formats prescribed in Annex II.

controls.control_objective: To ensure normally include a consolidated balance sheet, consolidated statement of profit and loss, principal accounting policies, and 'notes to accounts'
controls.control_description:

consolidated statement of profit and loss, principal accounting policies, and 'Notes
to Accounts'.

them in the applicable accounting standards for the bank.

bank.

used to determine the dominant activity and accounting norms specified by its
regulator may be used for the consolidation of similar transactions and events.

to a bank shall be used for consolidation purposes in respect of like transactions
and other events in similar circumstances.

controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invariably record the intent of holding the investment for a temporary period or otherwise at the time of investment in the associate, joint venture

controls.control_objective: To ensure be consolidated into the cfs
controls.control_description:
Provided that, in the absence of a record of such intent by the Board at the time of
such investment, the investee entity shall be consolidated into the CFS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be consolidated into the cfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account entries
controls.control_description:
A bank shall adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account
entries.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to following guidelines for unreconciled inter-branch account entries

controls.control_objective: To ensure segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'blocked account' which
controls.control_description:
(1) The bank shall segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in
the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'Blocked Account' which
shall be shown under 'Other Liabilities and Provisions - Others'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to segregate the credit entries outstanding for more than five years in the inter-branch account and transfer them to a separate 'blocked account' which

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted only with the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the controlling / head office if the amount exceeds ₹ one lakh
controls.control_description:
(2) Any adjustment from the Blocked Account should be permitted only with the
authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the Controlling / Head
Office if the amount exceeds ₹ one lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted only with the authorisation of two officials, one of whom should be from the controlling / head office if the amount exceeds ₹ one lakh

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of the maintenance of cash reserve ratio (crr) and statutory liquidity ratio (slr)
controls.control_description:
(3) The balance in Blocked Account shall be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of
the maintenance of Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) and Statutory Liquidity Ratio
(SLR).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as a liability for the purpose of the maintenance of cash reserve ratio (crr) and statutory liquidity ratio (slr)

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done categ
controls.control_description:
(4) The bank shall maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of
transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done
category-wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain category-wise (head-wise) accounts for various types of transactions put through inter-branch accounts, so that the netting can be done categ

controls.control_objective: To ensure segregate the debit and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise, while also consid
controls.control_description:
As on the balance sheet date, the bank shall segregate the debit
and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at
the net position category-wise, while also considering the balance in the Blocked
Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to segregate the debit and credit entries remaining unreconciled for more than six months and arrive at the net position category-wise, while also consid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be aggregated and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made
controls.control_description:
(5) The net debit under all the categories of inter-branch accounts shall be aggregated
and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be aggregated and a provision equivalent to 100 per cent of the aggregate net debit shall be made

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the net debit in one category is not set- off against net credit in another category
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the bank shall ensure that the net debit in one category is not set-
off against net credit in another category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the net debit in one category is not set- off against net credit in another category

controls.control_objective: To ensure of a bank shall be as under: (1) the bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation of differences
controls.control_description:
Treatment of outstanding entries in Nostro accounts shall of a bank shall be as
under:
(1) The bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in
place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation
of differences, if any.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to of a bank shall be as under: (1) the bank shall take steps to have a strong control over reconciliation and put in place a system of real-time reconciliation, which provides for immediate escalation of differences

controls.control_objective: To ensure be close monitoring of pending items in nostro accounts by top management at short intervals
controls.control_description:
<image>
(2) There shall be close monitoring of pending items in Nostro accounts by top
management at short intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be close monitoring of pending items in nostro accounts by top management at short intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to a blocked account and shown as outstanding liabilities
controls.control_description:
(3) All unreconciled credit entries in Nostro accounts which are outstanding for more
than three years shall be transferred to a Blocked Account and shown as
outstanding liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to a blocked account and shown as outstanding liabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the purpose of crr / slr
controls.control_description:
(4) The balance in the Blocked Account shall be reckoned for the purpose of CRR /
SLR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the purpose of crr / slr

controls.control_objective: To ensure make 100 per cent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries in the nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years
controls.control_description:
(5) A bank shall make 100 per cent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries
in the Nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make 100 per cent provision in respect of all unreconciled debit entries in the nostro accounts, which are outstanding for more than two years

controls.control_objective: To ensure to transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to
controls.control_description:
In terms of section 17(1) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 a bank is required to
transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a
sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to Reserve Fund.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to transfer, out of the balance of profit as disclosed in the profit and loss account, a sum equivalent to not less than 20 per cent of such profit to

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer not less than 25 per cent of the 'net profit' before appropriations to the statutory reserve
controls.control_description:
However, to augment capital, a
bank shall transfer not less than 25 per cent of the 'net profit' before appropriations
to the Statutory Reserve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer not less than 25 per cent of the 'net profit' before appropriations to the statutory reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure take prior approval from the rbi before any appropriation is made from the statutory reserve or any other reserve
controls.control_description:
Unless specifically allowed by extant regulations, the bank shall take prior approval
from the RBI before any appropriation is made from the Statutory Reserve or any
other reserve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take prior approval from the rbi before any appropriation is made from the statutory reserve or any other reserve

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reflected in the profit and loss account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i
controls.control_description:
Banks are further advised that,
(1) all expenses including provisions and write-offs recognised in a period, whether
mandatory or prudential, shall be reflected in the profit and loss account for the
period as an 'above the line' item (i.e., before arriving at the net profit / loss for the
year);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reflected in the profit and loss account for the period as an 'above the line' item (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be effected only 'below the line' (i
controls.control_description:
(2) draw down from reserves, with the prior approval of RBI, shall be effected only
'below the line' (i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be effected only 'below the line' (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made of such draw down in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet
controls.control_description:
and
(3) suitable disclosures shall be made of such draw down in the 'Notes on Accounts'
to the Balance Sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made of such draw down in the 'notes on accounts' to the balance sheet

controls.control_objective: To ensure be utilised for writing off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the share premium account shall not be utilised for writing off the
expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be utilised for writing off the expenses relating to the issue of debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure include registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties
controls.control_description:
Explanation: For the purposes of this Direction, issue expenses shall include
registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and
other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include registration and other regulatory fees, payments made to legal, accounting, and other professional advisers, printing costs, and stamp duties

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to make the provision for the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the fraud has been
controls.control_description:
In respect of provisioning for frauds, a bank that has reported the fraud within the
prescribed time shall have the option to make the provision for the same over a
period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the
fraud has been detected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to make the provision for the same over a period, not exceeding four quarters, commencing from the quarter in which the fraud has been

controls.control_objective: To ensure debit reserves other than the statutory reserve by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions
controls.control_description:
Where the bank chooses to provide for the fraud over two to four quarters and this
results in the full provisioning being made in more than one financial year, subject
to compliance with applicable laws, it may debit reserves other than the Statutory
Reserve by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial year by
credit to provisions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to debit reserves other than the statutory reserve by the amount remaining un-provided at the end of the financial year by credit to provisions

controls.control_objective: To ensure , it should subsequently reverse the debits to the reserves proportionately and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the
controls.control_description:
Provided that, it should subsequently reverse the debits to the reserves
proportionately and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account,
in the successive quarters of the next financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , it should subsequently reverse the debits to the reserves proportionately and complete the provisioning by debiting profit and loss account, in the

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be made at once
controls.control_description:
Where there has been delay, beyond the prescribed period, in reporting the fraud
to the RBI, the entire provisioning is required to be made at once.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made at once

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves
controls.control_description:
Unreconciled credit balances in any transitory account representing unclaimed
balances shall not be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred to the profit and loss account or to any reserves

controls.control_objective: To ensure make provisions for dtl on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961
controls.control_description:
A bank shall make provisions for DTL on the Special Reserve created under
Section 36(1)(viii) of Income Tax Act, 1961.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make provisions for dtl on the special reserve created under section 36(1)(viii) of income tax act, 1961

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflect true and fair picture of its financial position
controls.control_description:
A bank shall ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflect true and
fair picture of its financial position.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that balance sheet and profit and loss account reflect true and fair picture of its financial position

controls.control_objective: To ensure be viewed seriously and appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 shall be considered
controls.control_description:
Instances of window dressing of financials, short provisioning, under-reporting /
incorrect computation of exposure / risk weight, incorrect capitalisation of
expenses, deliberate inflation of asset and liabilities at the end of the financial year
and subsequent reversal immediately in next financial year, etc., shall be viewed
seriously and appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 shall be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be viewed seriously and appropriate penal action in terms of the provisions of the banking regulation act, 1949 shall be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these Directions,
instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
<image>
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under this head
controls.control_description: For Banks incorporated outside India Capital (i) The amount brought in by banks by way of start-up capital as prescribed by RBI should be shown under this head.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under this head

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under this item with appropriate foot-note
controls.control_description:
Others *
Total
* In case there is any unadjusted balance of loss the same may be shown under this item with appropriate foot-note.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under this item with appropriate foot-note

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in brackets
controls.control_description:
Miscellaneous Income
Total
Note: Under items II to V loss figures shall be shown in brackets
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in brackets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be for both basic and diluted
controls.control_description:
Appropriations
Transfer to statutory reserves
Transfer to other reserves
Transfer to Government / Proposed dividend
Balance carried over to consolidated balance sheet
Total
Earnings per Share1
1Earning per share shall be for both basic and diluted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be for both basic and diluted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under each of the specified heads
controls.control_description:
Schedule 2 - Reserves and Surplus1

As on 31.3.__ (current year)
As on 31.3.__
(previous
year) Statutory Reserves


Capital Reserves


Capital Reserve on Consolidation


Share Premium


Other Reserves (specify nature)


Revenue and other Reserves


Balance in Profit and Loss Account2


Total
1Opening balances, additions and deductions since the last consolidated balance sheet shall be shown under each of
the specified heads.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under each of the specified heads

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as a deduction
controls.control_description: 2In case of loss the balance shall be shown as a deduction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as a deduction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be presented in the consolidated balance sheet and consolidated profit and loss account and schedules thereto when required by a statute, accounting s
controls.control_description:
Additional line items, headings and sub-headings shall be presented in the consolidated balance sheet
and consolidated profit and loss account and schedules thereto when required by a statute, Accounting
Standards or when such a presentation is necessary to present the true and fair view of the group's financial
position and operating results.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be presented in the consolidated balance sheet and consolidated profit and loss account and schedules thereto when required by a statute, accounting s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be followed
controls.control_description:
In the preparation and presentation of CFS Accounting Standards issued by
the ICAI, to the extent applicable to banks, and the guidelines issued by RBI shall be followed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be followed
